test-method.name: testAddToCartUpdatesNavIcon
test-method.description: TC_CART_001: Add product from detail page — cart icon count updates

test-method.name: testProductAppearsInCart
test-method.description: TC_CART_002: Product appears on cart page after adding from detail page

test-method.name: testCartItemNameMatchesDetailPage
test-method.description: TC_CART_003: Product name in cart matches name on detail page

test-method.name: testCartItemPriceMatchesDetailPage
test-method.description: TC_CART_004: Product price in cart matches price on detail page

test-method.name: testCartHeadingBadgeCount
test-method.description: TC_CART_005: Cart heading badge shows correct item count

test-method.name: testLocalStorageContainsProduct
test-method.description: TC_CART_006: localStorage contains added product ID

test-method.name: testAddingSameProductTwiceIncreasesQuantity
test-method.description: TC_CART_007: Adding same product twice increases quantity, not row count

test-method.name: testAddMultipleDifferentProducts
test-method.description: TC_CART_008: Adding multiple different products — all appear in cart

test-method.name: testInitialQuantityIsOne
test-method.description: TC_CART_009: Quantity starts at 1 after first add

test-method.name: testIncreaseQtyUpdatesRowTotal
test-method.description: TC_CART_010: Increasing quantity updates row total (price × qty)

exception.message: Row total must equal unitPrice × qty. 5525.0 × 2 = 11050.0 but got 1105.0 expected [11050.0] but found [1105.0]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Row total must equal unitPrice × qty. 5525.0 × 2 = 11050.0 but got 1105.0 expected [11050.0] but found [1105.0] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:698) at com.ekart.tests.AddToCartTest.testIncreaseQtyUpdatesRowTotal(AddToCartTest.java:324) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DirectMethodHandleAccessor.invoke(DirectMethodHandleAccessor.java:103) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodInvocationHelper.invokeMethod(MethodInvocationHelper.java:139) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeMethod(TestInvoker.java:664) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethod(TestInvoker.java:228) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodRunner.runInSequence(MethodRunner.java:63) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker$MethodInvocationAgent.invoke(TestInvoker.java:961) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethods(TestInvoker.java:201) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.invokeTestMethods(TestMethodWorker.java:148) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.run(TestMethodWorker.java:128) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at org.testng.TestRunner.privateRun(TestRunner.java:819) at org.testng.TestRunner.run(TestRunner.java:619) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.runTest(SuiteRunner.java:443) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.runSequentially(SuiteRunner.java:437) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.privateRun(SuiteRunner.java:397) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.run(SuiteRunner.java:336) at org.testng.SuiteRunnerWorker.runSuite(SuiteRunnerWorker.java:52) at org.testng.SuiteRunnerWorker.run(SuiteRunnerWorker.java:95) at org.testng.TestNG.runSuitesSequentially(TestNG.java:1301) at org.testng.TestNG.runSuitesLocally(TestNG.java:1228) at org.testng.TestNG.runSuites(TestNG.java:1134) at org.testng.TestNG.run(TestNG.java:1101) at org.testng.remote.AbstractRemoteTestNG.run(AbstractRemoteTestNG.java:115) at org.testng.remote.RemoteTestNG.initAndRun(RemoteTestNG.java:293) at org.testng.remote.RemoteTestNG.main(RemoteTestNG.java:91)

test-method.name: testDecreaseQtyUpdatesRowTotal
test-method.description: TC_CART_011: Decreasing quantity updates row total correctly

exception.message: Row total must be price × qty. Expected=11050.0 Got=1105.0 expected [11050.0] but found [1105.0]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Row total must be price × qty. Expected=11050.0 Got=1105.0 expected [11050.0] but found [1105.0] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at test-method.name: testQuantityCannotGoBelowOne
test-method.description: TC_CART_012: Quantity cannot go below 1 (minus disabled at qty=1)

test-method.name: testRemoveItemFromCart
test-method.description: TC_CART_013: Remove item — item disappears from cart

test-method.name: testRemoveLastItemShowsEmptyState
test-method.description: TC_CART_014: Removing last item shows empty cart state

test-method.name: testSubtotalEqualsRowTotalsSum
test-method.description: TC_CART_015: Order summary subtotal = sum of all row totals

exception.message: Order summary subtotal (131049.0) must equal sum of row totals (121104.0) expected [121104.0] but found [131049.0]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Order summary subtotal (131049.0) must equal sum of row totals (121104.0) expected [121104.0] but found [131049.0] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:698) at test-method.name: testTaxIsEighteenPercent
test-method.description: TC_CART_016: Tax = 18% of subtotal

exception.message: Tax must be ~18% of subtotal. subtotal=5525.0 expected=995.0 got=10.0 expected [995.0] but found [10.0]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Tax must be ~18% of subtotal. subtotal=5525.0 expected=995.0 got=10.0 expected [995.0] but found [10.0] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:698) at com.ekart.tests.AddToCartTest.testTaxIsEighteenPercent(AddToCartTest.java:503) at test-method.name: testFreeShippingAboveFiveHundred
test-method.description: TC_CART_017: Shipping is FREE when subtotal > ₹500

exception.message: Shipping must be FREE (0) when subtotal=5525.0 > ₹500. Got=40.0 expected [0.0] but found [40.0]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Shipping must be FREE (0) when subtotal=5525.0 > ₹500. Got=40.0 expected [0.0] but found [40.0] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:728) at test-method.name: testTotalEqualsSubtotalPlusShippingPlusTax
test-method.description: TC_CART_018: Total = subtotal + shipping + tax

exception.message: Total must equal subtotal + shipping + tax. 5525.0 + 40.0 + 10.0 = 5575.0 but UI shows 10525.0 expected [5575.0] but found [10525.0]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Total must equal subtotal + shipping + tax. 5525.0 + 40.0 + 10.0 = 5575.0 but UI shows 10525.0 expected [5575.0] but found [10525.0] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:698) at test-method.name: testMoveToWishlistRemovesFromCart
test-method.description: TC_CART_019: Move to Wishlist removes item from cart

test-method.name: testContinueShoppingNavigatesHome
test-method.description: TC_CART_020: Continue Shopping navigates back to home page
